Meta's smart glasses are gaining an AI assistant with vision and voice. The goal is simple: useful, hands-free help you'll actually use throughout the day.

## What's included

- Object ID, scene summaries, and translations
- Camera capture and share to Instagram/WhatsApp
- On-device models for responsiveness
- Privacy controls for safe, ambient use

## Why it matters

Ambient AI needs the right form factor. Glasses could make assistance feel natural - if the experience is reliable and secure.

-
Sources: Public product imagery and news coverage (Oct 2025)
